task_objective: Address code review findings in /tmp/sdh_ludusavi/review_findings.md by refactoring the Last Operation UI render block using a safe IIFE and updating tests to use regex matching.
design_decisions: Refactored index.tsx to split selectedHistory.timestamp inside a block-scoped Immediately Invoked Function Expression (IIFE), safely handling missing/undefined properties and avoiding runtime TypeErrors.
Updated test assertions to use re.search with flexible spacing patterns, making the test suite resilient to style and indentation formatting changes.
